description:
Advances: mutagen.mutation_pipeline, mutagen.coverage

Closes **F9** (HIGH, Idioms H2). Eleven `apply(Map.get(cfg, :facade, ProductionMod), :fun, [arg])` call sites span runner / baseline / coverage / loop. The Mix tasks dispatch table has 11 `{mod, fun}` keys. No compile-time dispatch, specs are a lie, no Dialyzer leverage.

## Deliverable

Define behaviours and switch call sites to direct calls on a swappable module atom:

- `lib/mutagen_ex/test/ex_unit_facade.ex` (`@behaviour MutagenEx.Test.ExUnitFacade`) — ExUnit.run/0, ExUnit.Server.add_module/2, etc.
- `lib/mutagen_ex/test/compiler_facade.ex` — Code.compile_quoted/2
- `lib/mutagen_ex/test/cover_facade.ex` — :cover.* calls
- Production implementations live as default modules; test seams swap via cfg.

## Verification

- All existing facade-using tests pass without changes (they swap modules, not function names)
- Dialyzer reports no missing-spec warnings on facade modules
- mix test / mix compile --warnings-as-errors green

## Allowed touches

- lib/mutagen_ex/test/ (new subdirectory for facades)
- lib/mutagen_ex/mutation_runner.ex (call site swaps)
- lib/mutagen_ex/mutation_runner/mutation_loop.ex
- lib/mutagen_ex/baseline.ex
- lib/mutagen_ex/coverage_runner.ex
- lib/mix/tasks/mutagen.ex (dispatch table replacement)
- .spec/specs/ (any spec invariant about test-seam contract)
- Corresponding test files
- README.md, CHANGELOG.md

## Out of Scope
- Replace facades with mox-based mocks — facades are explicit behaviours, not mock contracts
- Refactor configuration shape beyond facade-name keys

## Merge gate
- [ ] mix compile --warnings-as-errors green
- [ ] mix test green
- [ ] Dialyzer clean on facade modules
- [ ] Scope check
- [ ] Auditor APPROVE
title: Replace apply/3 test seams with behaviour-backed facades
